isolation.note: All assertions share same user profile state - tested sequentially on same browser context

assertions.title: Profile page displays name and bio

steps.action: Register new user via curl API

steps.expected: Profile Settings displayed with name and bio
steps.observed: Profile Settings page shows 'Name: profile_test_1775594777' and Edit Profile button

steps.expected: Edit form displayed with pre-filled values
steps.observed: Edit form shows Name and About You fields

steps.expected: Name field contains 'profile_test_1775594777', bio is empty
steps.observed: Name field value is 'profile_test_1775594777', bio field is empty

assertions.title: Edit with empty name shows validation error
Cancel edit returns to display mode

steps.expected: Return to display mode with original values
steps.observed: Profile page shows original name 'profile_test_1775594777', no changes saved

steps.action: Fill in new name 'TestUser' and bio 'A stoic practitioner and meditation enthusiast'

steps.observed: Profile displays 'Name: TestUser' and 'Bio: A stoic practitioner and meditation enthusiast'

steps.action: Navigate away and return to profile page
steps.observed: Profile still shows 'Name: TestUser' and bio after navigation

assertions.title: Profile changes reflect on home page greeting

steps.action: Navigate to home page after profile edit
steps.expected: Home page shows updated greeting with new name
steps.observed: Home page displays 'Welcome, TestUser' and bio 'A stoic practitioner and meditation enthusiast'

steps.action: Click 'Log out of your account' button

steps.expected: Redirect to home page with profile data
steps.observed: Home page shows 'Welcome, TestUser' and bio after re-login
Profile data intact: 'TestUser' and 'A stoic practitioner and meditation enthusiast'

frictions.description: After profile edit and page reload, profile data took a moment to appear on the profile page. Navigation to home and back showed data correctly.
frictions.resolution: Waited for network idle and navigated between pages to confirm data persistence

summary: Tested 7 assertions (VAL-PROFILE-001 through VAL-PROFILE-007): All passed. Profile display, editing with validation, cancel functionality, save persistence, home page greeting updates, and logout/login persistence all work correctly.
